name: sidpro
description: SID Premium Enterprise - Sistem Informasi Desa

scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @sidpro/types build && pnpm --filter @sidpro/validators build && pnpm --filter @sidpro/ui build && pnpm --filter @sidpro/api test:coverage && pnpm --filter @sidpro/web test:coverage && pnpm --filter @sidpro/worker test:coverage && pnpm --filter @sidpro/validators test:coverage
scripts.audit:critical-path: pnpm --filter @sidpro/api exec tsx --test test/auth-refresh-token.test.ts test/tenants-authorization.test.ts test/budget-realization-ledger.test.ts test/reports-tenant-isolation.test.ts test/letters-validation.test.ts test/pagination-query-validation.middleware.test.ts test/api-route-access-policy.test.ts test/public-route-security-policy.test.ts && pnpm --filter @sidpro/worker exec tsx --test test/storage-cleanup.test.ts
